def negative_timing_metric_wraps_setup_and_teardown_noise_instead_of_core_operation():
    rule_id = "timing_metric_wraps_setup_and_teardown_noise_instead_of_core_operation"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag timers that measure unrelated setup work and make latency metrics noisy."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
